'''âj-dh-l''' ('''kajadhal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:linish|linish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:linish|linish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-dh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kajadhal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadhal|thijadhal]] || [[word:jijadhal|jijadhal]] || [[word:shijadhal|shijadhal]] || [[word:kijadhal|kijadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujadhal|thuthujadhal]] || [[word:jujujadhal|jujujadhal]] || [[word:shushujadhal|shushujadhal]] || [[word:kukujadhal|kukujadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujadhal|thujadhal]] || [[word:jujadhal|jujadhal]] || [[word:shujadhal|shujadhal]] || [[word:kujadhal|kujadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujadhal|thujadhal]] || [[word:jujadhal|jujadhal]] || [[word:shujadhal|shujadhal]] || [[word:kujadhal|kujadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejadhal|thejadhal]] || [[word:jejadhal|jejadhal]] || [[word:shejadhal|shejadhal]] || [[word:kejadhal|kejadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojadhal|thothojadhal]] || [[word:jojojadhal|jojojadhal]] || [[word:shoshojadhal|shoshojadhal]] || [[word:kokojadhal|kokojadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojadhal|thojadhal]] || [[word:jojadhal|jojadhal]] || [[word:shojadhal|shojadhal]] || [[word:kojadhal|kojadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojadhal|thojadhal]] || [[word:jojadhal|jojadhal]] || [[word:shojadhal|shojadhal]] || [[word:kojadhal|kojadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjadhal|thĂŠjadhal]] || [[word:jĂŠjadhal|jĂŠjadhal]] || [[word:shĂŠjadhal|shĂŠjadhal]] || [[word:kĂŠjadhal|kĂŠjadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajadhal|thathajadhal]] || [[word:jajajadhal|jajajadhal]] || [[word:shashajadhal|shashajadhal]] || [[word:kakajadhal|kakajadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajadhal|thajadhal]] || [[word:jajadhal|jajadhal]] || [[word:shajadhal|shajadhal]] || [[word:kajadhal|kajadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajadhal|thajadhal]] || [[word:jajadhal|jajadhal]] || [[word:shajadhal|shajadhal]] || [[word:kajadhal|kajadhal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajadhal|shajadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajadhal|goshajadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajadhal|gokishajadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajadhalnĂŒ|shajadhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajadhalnknĂŒ|goshajadhalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadhalnĂŒ|gokishajadhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajadhalshĂ«|shajadhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkshĂ«|goshajadhalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajadhalshĂ«|gokishajadhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadhalro|shajadhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkro|goshajadhalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadhalro|gokishajadhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadhalmu|shajadhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkmu|goshajadhalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadhalmu|gokishajadhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajadhalsher|shajadhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajadhalnksher|goshajadhalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajadhalsher|gokishajadhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajadhalng|shajadhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkng|goshajadhalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajadhalng|gokishajadhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajadhalya|shajadhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkya|goshajadhalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajadhalya|gokishajadhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajadhalyam|shajadhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkyam|goshajadhalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajadhalyam|gokishajadhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajadhalnĂŒshĂ«|shajadhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajadhalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajadhalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajadhalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajadhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadhalnĂŒro|shajadhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadhalnknĂŒro|goshajadhalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadhalnĂŒro|gokishajadhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadhalnĂŒmu|shajadhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadhalnknĂŒmu|goshajadhalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadhalnĂŒmu|gokishajadhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajadhalshĂ«nĂŒ|shajadhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajadhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadhalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajadhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadhalshĂ«ro|shajadhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkshĂ«ro|goshajadhalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadhalshĂ«ro|gokishajadhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadhalshĂ«mu|shajadhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkshĂ«mu|goshajadhalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadhalshĂ«mu|gokishajadhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajadhalronĂŒ|shajadhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkronĂŒ|goshajadhalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadhalronĂŒ|gokishajadhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajadhalroshĂ«|shajadhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkroshĂ«|goshajadhalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajadhalroshĂ«|gokishajadhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadhalromu|shajadhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkromu|goshajadhalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadhalromu|gokishajadhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajadhalmunĂŒ|shajadhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkmunĂŒ|goshajadhalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadhalmunĂŒ|gokishajadhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajadhalmushĂ«|shajadhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkmushĂ«|goshajadhalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajadhalmushĂ«|gokishajadhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadhalmuro|shajadhalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadhalnkmuro|goshajadhalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadhalmuro|gokishajadhalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
